battery_disclosure_level.description: Level of battery health transparency in the listing. 'tested_pct_cycles' = capacity % AND cycle count provided. 'tested_pct' = capacity % only. 'replaced' = seller states battery is new/replaced. 'health_range_claim' = e.g. '80-89% health'. 'vague_claim' = e.g. 'holds charge well', no data. 'none' = no battery information at all. 'sold_as_is' = explicitly not tested or not guaranteed.

battery_health_pct.description: Reported battery capacity as percentage of original.

battery_replaced.description: True if seller states battery has been replaced.

battery_disclosure_score.description: Score for transparency of battery disclosure.

battery_health_value_score.description: Score for actual battery health value (0 if undisclosed).

seller_feedback_pct.description: Positive feedback percentage of the seller.

warranty_au_redeemable.description: True if warranty is redeemable in Australia.

manufacture_year.description: Derived from cpu_model field using CPU generation lookup table.

risk_adjusted_price.description: Effective cost accounting for missing warranty, battery, and seller risk premiums.
